name: HMS ML 148 (ML 148)
events: 17 Sep 1944 Around 1230 A/17, HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) departed Heysham to participate in exercises off Morecambe Bay. HMML 148 (T/S.Lt. T.D. Stoner, RNVR) being in company as escort. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
